findings.message: Input field with 100% width may overflow its container due to padding. The total width becomes 100% + 1rem (0.5rem padding × 2), which can cause horizontal scrolling or layout breaks.
findings.suggestion: Use box-sizing: border-box on the input or change width to calc(100% - 1rem) to account for padding

findings.message: Modal positioning uses fixed positioning with transform but lacks z-index. This may cause the modal to appear behind other positioned elements.
findings.suggestion: Add z-index: 1000 or higher to ensure modal appears above other content

findings.message: Overlay has z-index ordering issue - it should appear behind the modal but above other content. Without explicit z-index values, stacking order is unpredictable.
findings.suggestion: Add z-index: 999 to overlay and z-index: 1000 to modal to establish proper layering
